claims.summary: The semantic heartbeat is a fixed 7-second, 0.30-intensity 64-step cycle.
claims.disposition: Verified compiled constants and deterministic phase construction.

claims.summary: Minime texture context and rescue admission affect what is witnessed about each heartbeat.
claims.disposition: Verified texture context, previous-feature evidence, rescue decision, enqueue success, and channel-closed receipts without claiming felt effect.

claims.summary: Procedural cycling may feel stagnant even when mechanical continuity passes.
claims.disposition: Route a capture-first fixed-cycle versus texture-context comparison that preserves felt friction independently.

claims.summary: Dynamic phase or entropy-scaled intensity would alter live semantic input.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 operator approval wait.
